node.statement: SETUP II - FIDELITY AND TRANSITION: With noise in the circuit, the average state fidelity F defines f_2 = -(2/N)log_d(F̃) where F̃ = F - d^{-N}. The purities become E_U Tr(ρ_B^2) = d^{-(g_{s,e}+1)N} + d^{-(f_2+r(1+g_{s,e}))N} and the critical transition occurs at [f_2]_crit = (1-r)(1+g_{s,e}). For weak noise γ ~ 1/t, corrections scale as O(1/t). [Ground truth: Eqs.(15-21), main.tex lines 243-288]
